caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, grey headphones, and a black hooded sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" printed in large gold letters on the front is seated at a desk in a studio. He is speaking and gesturing with his right hand while facing toward the left of the frame. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. On the desk to his right is a black container featuring the text "TALK OUT". In the background, a white banner is visible with the words "UNION HUSTLE" appearing multiple times, and a blue sign above the man reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak, shifting his hand gestures from wide open palms to a more closed, punctuated movement. A small logo that says "TALK OUT" appears in the bottom left corner of the scene.
